scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w shared
scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently -n web,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w web && npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w shared
